head: 5554d3f 2026-07-10 21:00:06 +0200
branches_note: Default branch is dev (HEAD 5554d3f). Only two remote branches: dev and main (da83a35). They diverge ONLY on deploy/infra manifests — dev has a postgres-claim PG18->17 fix, main has a tekton github-netrc secret commit; the application code (cmd/, internal/, gen/, migrations) is byte-identical on both. No branch is ahead on application code, so the ENG-2069 nothing-on-main hazard does not apply here: the merged scaffold is the whole implementation on either branch.

E1-S1.note: Six-tier layout (cmd/{api,relay,reaper} + internal/* + gen/ + deploy/ + CI/Makefile/Dockerfile) and the 501 route table (server.go:38) are real and deliberate. But contracts-tag CODEGEN is NOT wired: gen/ carries only hand-written Error/Banner/ErrorCode envelope shapes (gen/notimpl.go) with a comment that 'the full verb bodies land with the contracts codegen wiring'. No test exercises the route table.

E1-S2.note: Fully implemented with meaningful testcontainers tests. postgres.go has Open + EnsureSchema (embedded-FS forward-only applier under pg_advisory_xact_lock:107). 0001_baseline.sql: UUIDv7 PKs (uuidv7()), tenant column, FORCE RLS fail-closed policies on work_item + outbox. Tests: TestEnsureSchemaBaselineApplies (idempotent re-apply, table existence) + TestRLSFailsClosedWithoutTenantGUC (non-superuser role, 0 rows without GUC, 1 with GUC). NOTE: DoD names the test TestTenantRLSFailClosed; the repo test is TestRLSFailsClosedWithoutTenantGUC and covers only single-tenant GUC gating, not the AC4 cross-tenant B-while-GUC=A leak assertion (harden this). Migration deliberately minimal: only work_item+outbox tables exist yet.

E1-S3.note: authz/doc.go is a package-doc comment only, no code. No deny-by-default auth middleware is wired into internal/server. The only seams present are generic scaffold: config identity fields (IdentityURL/Issuer/Audience/JWKS/IntrospectionToken, config.go:56) and identityclient construction (clients.go:42). No per-agent token verification, no VerifyFresh, no pkg/auth wiring.

E1-S4.note: Outbox TABLE exists (0001_baseline.sql:58, tenant-keyed + RLS + deterministic event_id UNIQUE) and event.go builds the ADR-0007 CloudEvent envelope (NewEvent/EventType/Topic via lib pkg/events). But cmd/relay is a health-only stub with a TODO — no drain loop, no outbox writer in the store, no studio-spine publish. No tests.

E1-S5.note: Only the short_id column + UNIQUE(tenant, short_id) exist in the work_item schema (0001_baseline.sql:31,38). No wg- base32-crockford id generation logic exists anywhere and no contracts grammar validator.

E2-S1.note: internal/graph/doc.go is a doc comment only. POST/PATCH /v1/items are 501 stubs (server.go:50). No item CRUD, no notes/comments, no events emitted.

E2-S2.note: No edges table (0001_baseline migration explicitly defers edges), graph/doc.go empty, POST /v1/edges is a 501 stub. No typed edges, no cycle rejection.

E2-S3.note: Only schema affordances exist: denormalized blocked + deferred columns and the idx_work_item_ready partial index (0001_baseline.sql:33,41). GET /v1/ready and /v1/stats are 501 stubs; no ready/blocked/stats queries, no defer/undefer, no incremental recompute.

E2-S4.note: POST /v1/batch is a 501 stub. No one-transaction batch mutation logic, no per-resource event fan-out.

E2-S5.note: No coordination-primitive code: no gate items, work templates, or epic dispatch views. graph/doc.go is a doc comment only.

E2-S6.note: No load tests, no benchmark harness, no published degradation curve anywhere in the tree.

E3-S1.note: internal/claim/doc.go is a doc comment only. No claims/leases table in the migration. POST /v1/items/{id}/claim and /heartbeat are 501 stubs. No CAS claim, no lease TTL, no heartbeat.

E3-S2.note: cmd/reaper is a health-only binary scaffold with an explicit TODO(delivery) — no reaper tick, no conditional-CAS stale-lease revert. claim/doc.go empty. Binary scaffold + Deployment manifest exist only.

E3-S3.note: internal/handoff/doc.go is a doc comment only. POST /v1/handoffs is a 501 stub. No handoff state machine, no identity-registered role resolution.

E4-S1.note: internal/facts/doc.go is a doc comment only. POST/GET /v1/facts are 501 stubs. No remember/recall/forget, no injection caps, no elision banners (only the Banner envelope type exists in gen/).

E4-S2.note: internal/prime/doc.go is a doc comment only. GET /v1/prime is a 501 stub. No prime compact/full, no content contract, no token budget.

E4-S3.note: internal/ranking/doc.go is a doc comment only. GET /v1/search is a 501 stub. knowledgeclient is constructed (clients.go:41) but no hybrid retrieval/ranking logic uses it.

E4-S4.note: No retrieval spike, no published SLOs, no fast-path index-scan tier.

E5-S1.note: internal/janitor/doc.go is a doc comment only. POST /internal/consolidate is a 501 stub. No consolidation ADD/UPDATE/DELETE/NOOP, no cosine dedup.

E5-S2.note: internal/janitor/doc.go is a doc comment only. POST /internal/compact is a 501 stub. No tiered compaction, no summarize/archive, no restore.

E5-S3.note: internal/janitor/doc.go is a doc comment only. POST /internal/purge is a 501 stub. No cascading hard delete, no tombstone, no knowledge purge.

E5-S4.note: The three /internal/{consolidate,compact,purge} step-API routes are declared as 501 stubs with an Idempotency-Key comment (server.go:71) — a route seam only. No janitor step-API contract implementation, no orvex-studio-workflows schedules, no no-train EU-resident provider config.

E6-S1.note: internal/authz/doc.go is a doc comment only (describes the intended chokepoint). The RLS fail-closed policies (0001_baseline.sql:45) are the structural backstop and are present, but the authz chokepoint logic, 3-state privacy enum, and per-item grants are absent. POST /v1/grants is a 501 stub.

E6-S2.note: No org-shared namespace logic, no polymorphic {user|org} admin-grant path. authz/doc.go doc comment only; schema has no grant table.

E6-S3.note: internal/quota/doc.go is a doc comment only. The frozen CodeQuotaExceeded=QUOTA_EXCEEDED constant exists (gen/notimpl.go:14) but no 402 verdict logic and no billing-entitlement check. billingclient is constructed but unused for quota.

E6-S4.note: The Banner/BannerKind envelope types (elision|staleness|degraded, gen/notimpl.go:25) exist as contract shapes, but no degradation-posture logic: no honest-empty prime/recall, no CAS-safe claim under outage. Handlers are all 501.

E7-S1.note: No MCP server/adapter code in the repo. No workgraph_* tool section, no studio_memory disambiguation pointers.

E7-S2.note: No CLI code in this repo (orvex-cli is a separate repo). No workgraph CLI section present here.

E7-S3.note: No KG interop adapter (entities/relations/observations), no golden fixtures.

E7-S4.note: No Claude memory-tool backend (memory_20250818 /memories file ops).

E8-S1.note: OTel is wired via orvex-studio-lib pkg/obs.Setup in every cmd main, and event.go builds studio.workgraph.<resource>.<pastTense> ADR-0007 envelopes (EventType:31, NewEvent:40). But the per-resource event schemas in gen/ are absent (gen carries only Error/Banner), the sources/workgraph.yaml source-adapter with acl_primitive does not exist, and no events are actually emitted (no store writes). No tests.

E8-S2.note: No console fleet-view code, no knowledge projections, no anomaly detectors, no fact pin/unpin.

E9-S1.note: No prompt-pack store: no table, no versioned revisions, no server-side reinforcement.

E9-S2.note: No adherence telemetry, no pre-GA viability spike, no GA gate.

E9-S3.note: No wiki-worthy flow. stagingclient is explicitly noted as pending its lib typed client (clients.go comment) and is intentionally absent — no package/submit-Proposal path exists.

summary: orvex-studio-workgraph is a deliberate, well-structured SCAFFOLD, not an implementation. Only E1-S2 (Postgres store baseline) is genuinely present with meaningful testcontainers tests (embedded-FS advisory-lock migration applier + fail-closed RLS on work_item/outbox). Three stories are partial seams (E1-S1 six-tier layout + 501 route table but no contracts codegen; E1-S4 outbox table + event-envelope helper but no relay drain; E8-S1 OTel + event-type helper but no schemas/source-adapter/emission). The remaining 31 stories are absent: every domain package (authz, graph, claim, handoff, facts, prime, ranking, janitor, quota) is a doc-comment-only stub, and all 18 API/step-API verbs return 501 NOT_IMPLEMENTED.
